translations.fr: Je veux un animal de compagnie.
translations.pt: Quero ter um animal de estimação.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn nuôi một con thú cưng.
translations.ja: ペットを飼いたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, finite (1st person singular, Konjunktiv II used for desire), predicate of the clause.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Haustier'.
Common noun, neuter singular; theme/patient in accusative associated with the predicate.

sentences.target: Mein Haustier schläft immer neben dem Sofa.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈhaʊ̯sˌtiːɐ̯ ʃlɛːft ˈɪmɐ ˈneːbən deːm ˈzoːfa/

translations.de: Mein Haustier schläft immer neben dem Sofa.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈhaʊ̯sˌtiːɐ̯ ʃlɛːft ˈɪmɐ ˈneːbən deːm ˈzoːfa/
translations.en: My pet always sleeps next to the sofa.
translations.es: Mi mascota siempre duerme al lado del sofá.
translations.fr: Mon animal dort toujours à côté du canapé.
translations.it: Il mio animale domestico dorme sempre accanto al divano.
translations.ko: 우리 반려동물은 항상 소파 옆에서 자요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的宠物总是睡在沙发旁边。
translations.yue: 我隻寵物成日喺梳化旁邊瞓覺。
translations.ru: Мой питомец всегда спит рядом с диваном.
translations.pt: Meu animal de estimação sempre dorme ao lado do sofá.
translations.he: חיית המחמד שלי תמיד ישנה ליד הספה.
translations.tr: Evcil hayvanım hep kanepenin yanında uyur.
translations.vi: Thú cưng của tôi luôn ngủ bên cạnh ghế sofa.
translations.ar: حيواني الأليف ينام دائمًا بجانب الأريكة.
translations.nl: Mijn huisdier slaapt altijd naast de bank.
translations.uk: Мій улюбленець завжди спить поруч із диваном.
translations.hu: A háziállatom mindig a kanapé mellett alszik.
translations.hi: मेरा पालतू जानवर हमेशा सोफ़े के पास सोता है.
translations.pl: Mój zwierzak zawsze śpi obok kanapy.
translations.el: Το κατοικίδιό μου κοιμάται πάντα δίπλα στον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Kjæledyret mitt sover alltid ved siden av sofaen.
translations.id: Hewan peliharaan saya selalu tidur di sebelah sofa.
translations.sv: Mitt husdjur sover alltid bredvid soffan.
translations.ro: Animalul meu de companie doarme mereu lângă canapea.
translations.cs: Můj mazlíček vždy spí vedle gauče.
translations.da: Mit kæledyr sover altid ved siden af sofaen.
translations.ja: うちのペットはいつもソファの横で寝ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative singular neuter; modifies 'Haustier'.
Common noun, neuter singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; agrees with the subject.
Adverb of frequency; modifies the verb.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; determiner of 'Sofa' after 'neben'.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition 'neben' (dative).

sentences.target: Wir suchen ein Haustier für die Kinder.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈzuːxən aɪ̯n ˈhaʊ̯sˌtiːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈkɪndɐ/

translations.de: Wir suchen ein Haustier für die Kinder.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈzuːxən aɪ̯n ˈhaʊ̯sˌtiːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈkɪndɐ/
translations.en: We are looking for a pet for the kids.
translations.es: Estamos buscando una mascota para los niños.
translations.fr: Nous cherchons un animal de compagnie pour les enfants.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un animale domestico per i bambini.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为孩子找一只宠物。
translations.yue: 我哋為啲小朋友搵隻寵物。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um animal de estimação para as crianças.
translations.tr: Çocuklar için bir evcil hayvan arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một thú cưng cho bọn trẻ.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن حيوان أليف للأطفال.
translations.nl: We zoeken een huisdier voor de kinderen.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо домашнього улюбленця для дітей.
translations.hi: हम बच्चों के लिए एक पालतू जानवर ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε ένα κατοικίδιο για τα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter et kjæledyr til barna.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari hewan peliharaan untuk anak-anak.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter ett husdjur till barnen.
translations.ro: Căutăm un animal de companie pentru copii.
translations.da: Vi leder efter et kæledyr til børnene.
translations.ja: 子どもたちのためにペットを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite (1st person plural present indicative); takes an accusative object.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Haustier'.
Common noun, neuter singular; direct object (accusative) of 'suchen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a beneficiary prepositional phrase.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of 'Kinder' after 'für'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'für' (accusative).

translations.en: Our pet makes noise at night.
translations.es: Nuestra mascota hace ruido por la noche.
translations.fr: Notre animal fait du bruit la nuit.
translations.it: Il nostro animale domestico fa rumore la notte.
translations.pt: Nosso animal de estimação faz barulho à noite.
translations.he: חיית המחמד שלנו עושה רעש בלילה.
translations.vi: Thú cưng của chúng tôi ồn ào vào ban đêm.
translations.hi: हमारा पालतू रात में शोर करता है.
translations.el: Το κατοικίδιό μας κάνει φασαρία τη νύχτα.
translations.id: Hewan peliharaan kami berisik di malam hari.
translations.sv: Vårt husdjur för oväsen på natten.
translations.ro: Animalul nostru de companie face zgomot noaptea.
translations.cs: Náš mazlíček v noci dělá hluk.
translations.ja: うちのペットは夜にうるさいです。
